customer_anxiety_profile: Spam-call filter anxiety — customer explicitly stated he does not answer numbers he does not recognize. The appointment is at risk if the specialist's callback number is not included in the Tuesday reminder text. Customer is otherwise self-motivated and cooperative.
unresolved_concerns: Wife is on title and was not included in the appointment — she is an unconfirmed variable at the close.
Customer has no current utility bill and no Virginia electricity history — the design will be based on square footage only until he is in the home.
Customer is pre-occupancy until June 17 — the Wednesday appointment is weeks before he moves in, which may affect his sense of urgency or readiness to commit.
sensitive_topics_raised: Military PCS move — customer is in transition and making a financial decision before he has settled into the home.
Wife's birthday falls on the Saturday of the appointment week — scheduling sensitivity noted.
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment booked for Wednesday at 10AM, one hour block.
Reminder text will be sent Tuesday to confirm the time.
The reminder text will include the specialist's callback number so the customer knows whose call to answer.
The specialist call is framed as a 'preliminary call to make sure all the numbers make sense' — customer expects a design review with pricing discussion.
closer_should_know: This customer will not answer an unrecognized number — confirm your callback number is in the Tuesday reminder text before the Wednesday appointment, or the sit will not happen. Customer is self-motivated and pre-sold on the concept; the wife on title was not included and should be addressed at the top of the call.
